content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1605: Achieving supreme enlightenment

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Hitesh_

The Roulette of Fate moved fast forward on the long journey. Sauron stepped on the roulette, clasping his hands behind his back, his face calm and cold.

Behind him was the group led by Absolute Beginning creature Yuan. Han Tian, Serene Prison, and Rupert all had a beautiful, exquisite mark of a spiderweb on their forehead, which was the seal that tied their souls!

Even an intimidating expert like Yuan couldn’t escape Sauron’s net of life. In this moment, he had become a slave, his soul altar detained.

At this moment, Sauron was stronger than ever!

Riding the Roulette of Fate, Sauron took Yuan, Serene Prison, and Han Tian to strike forward. Any creature bumped into him would be enslaved, their souls controlled.

He was almost invincible!

Almost at the same time, Desolate—the God of War—was moving across the void, taking in more Power Upanishad Origins. He was strengthening himself, trying to accumulate energy for the last brutal fight.

Meanwhile, Shi Yan was also trying his best.

His Evil clone was still devouring the Power Upanishad Origin, fighting against Devour in that dark tunnel. Their competition of energy, Power Upanishad, realm, and will had to produce a clear result.

At the same time, after the Star clone killed Fan De Lei, it had begun to fuse with the sea of stars, making it the most magical essence of his power.

Shi Yan’s host body had left toward the sea of life at his max speed. Watching the area with rolling life energy and the condensed aura from the milky sea, he was struck.

“I’m back! This time, I want to take in the power of the Life Power Upanishad Origin!”

The blood in his body burned and drops of ruby blood oozed out of his pores. As his body shivered, his blood flew away like blood spirits.

Each drop of blood turned into a blood shadow, which then twisted and congregated into a Shi Yan. As soon as another clone was created, Shi Yan divided his tier of power Upanishads.

The Life seal emerged from his head in the shape of a crystal ball and moved toward the clone.

He did the same to the soul pond and the Soul Consciousness, which entered the clone through his eyes. Pondering for a while, he let out a low shout, and the co-soul with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower flew out of his host body, entering the clone’s head.

The co-soul was made of Shi Yan’s soul and the Grace Mainland’s Origin; this special soul had fused with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. After Shi Yan had divided and created two clones, he thought he had to use the co-soul this time to ensure the success rate of fusing with the Life Power Upanishad Origin.

Swoosh!

The co-soul fell on the clone’s head and hovered above the new soul altar, along with an immense and thick life energy.

Shi Yan’s host body and the Life clone exchanged looks, then the Life clone moved toward the sea of life without a second’s wait. This time, it wasn’t rejected, entering the sea of life in just a blink.

A magical feeling reflected in his mind, the feeling life fusing being so clear.

‘It works!’

As the Life clone got the approval from the Life Power Upanishad Origin, vitality from everywhere continually rolled toward it from the sea of life. Shortly, the clone was given tonics that had strengthened its soul, bones, soul altar, and body wholly, which enhanced it greatly.

By the sea of life, Shi Yan’s host body hovered as he quieted down his mind to sense and feel the harmony between the sea of life and his clone, feeling each step of the fusion.

“Unless there’s a stronger creature with a better understanding of the Life Power Upanishad, no one can stop my fusion.” Pondering for a while, Shi Yan smiled while muttering to himself, “Okay, only the Space power Upanishad’s left...”

Then, his body urged the power of space to leave this place.

The Evil clone, the Star clone, and the Life clone were detached from Shi Yan’s host body, and they had taken with them three-fourths of his energy, power Upanishads, and even blood. Currently, his host body had only one-fourth of the power he had in his peak condition. If he encountered a strong opponent, he wouldn’t be able to win.

Fortunately, the host body kept the Space power Upanishad, the best power to use in case he had to run for his life! His body rippled with space energy while moving through the void in search of the Space Power Upanishad Origin to take this last essence power.

This search seemed to absorb all of his luck as it became gradually harsh. Even after an unknown but long time, he hadn’t found the energy fluctuation of the Space Power Upanishad Origin. However, he wasn’t really hurried, because the other three clones were having a steady progress.

As the Life Power Upanishad Origin and the Star Power Upanishad Origin were being taken in, the power of his host body was slowly increasing. Also because of the fusion, the Life clone also received benefits with the increase of realm and power understanding.

Slowly, the Evil clone gained a little advantage in the battle against Devour. As the other clones were getting stronger, the Evil clone got stronger as well, which made the chance of victory lean on his side.

The situation was favorable to him, which was why he wasn’t hurried.

His clones were accumulating energy while his host body was searching for the Space Power Upanishad Origin. He finally got time to consider and reason the situation. Why had they come here? What was this place? What were the Absolute Beginning’s mysteries?

He quieted down, keeping his soul clear and tranquil while wandering aimlessly.

Along the way, he luckily found a scorching ball with burning power of thousands of fire abilities— it was the Fire Power Upanishad Origin! He had also met a terrifying tornado that was moving around, howling and screaming past him.

It was the Wind Power Upanishad Origin. Unfortunately, Han Tian wasn’t around, and he couldn’t contact the other. Thus, he had to give it up.

Cantecie cultivated the Wind Power Upanishad as well, but she had perished already. No one could find that Wind Power Upanishad Origin anymore.

The appearance of the Fire Power Upanishad Origin and the Wind Power Upanishad Origin repeated in his head as he was trying to figure out where he was and why it had so many Power Upanishad Origins like this.

Staying pensive, he gradually forgot his target—the Space Power Upanishad Origin—as all of his body and mind had been absorbed into his thoughts.

After a long time, something flashed in his head one day. He was shaken while a magnificent light radiated from his eyes.

“I got it! I got it!” He couldn’t help but scream, swinging his hands in thrill. The thick mist was clear; the smoke and clouds that covered his soul were swept away.

“This place’s Absolute Beginning’s tier of power Upanishads, and the vague, endless void is Absolute Beginning’s territory. This place is Absolute Beginning’s soul altar! Its Sea of Consciousness, tier of power Upanishads, and the host soul were made with the same method!” Shi Yan hissed, his eyes clear.

He had finally confirmed this!

Before Absolute Beginning disappeared, he had used its soul, body, and blood to create creatures. Desolate, Yuan, and Devour of the Absolute Beginning Era used to be parts of Absolute Beginning. Absolute Beginning understood the principle of all power Upanishads; he was the rule-maker in this universe. After he vanished, Desolate, Yuan, and Devour all had his memory of power Upanishads more or less.

That was why Yuan was born a Water creature, Devour got the Devouring and the eight evil power Upanishads, and Zi Yao had mastered the Divine Light...

Every creature in this world was created by Absolute Beginning. It was similar to how Desolate created the Immortal Demon Clan, Imperial Dark Tribe, Heavenly Monster Tribe, and the God Clan; and Devour had given birth to the Devouring Clan...

The vastly immense universe, the home of billions of creatures, was actually Desolate’s territory. Because of his supreme power, his territory was endless, with millions of smaller territories inside.

The Absolute Beginning Gateway was the door to get out of that territory, and the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was the key. Moving through the Absolute Beginning Gateway was actually leaving the territory Absolute Beginning had created for his tier of power Upanishads.

All the power Upanishads the creatures had cultivated came from the Power Upanishad Origin in Absolute Beginning’s soul altar. If a warrior got a Power Upanishad Origin, he would become the one who could make a power Upanishad’s principle, which was a God seal that would never fade!

This area was the tier of power Upanishads, the cradle of all power Upanishads, the world under the tier of territory in his soul altar. Then, what was underneath this tier?

The Sea of Consciousness!

“I’m sure there’s another tier down there! The Sea of Consciousness will have the soul pond...Absolute Beginning’s soul pond! Oh my God! What separates these two tiers? Space? The Space Power Upanishad Origin?”

Shi Yan was shaken as he observed the void underneath, his face changed.

Of course, the Power Upanishad Origin was so precious. But, if his assumptions were correct, deep in the void under his feet would be another tier, Absolute Beginning’s Sea of Consciousness! The Sea of Consciousness would have the soul pond, which contained Absolute Beginning’s purest soul energy, also the energy that could create souls and lives! It was the most mysterious energy in this world!

Absolute Beginning’s soul pond!

A chain of thought ran through his head and he took a deep breath. As he believed in his assumption, he began to sink into the void underneath! He believed that something would be down there, and he wanted to check it out.

After his host soul had discharged the Star, Life, and Devouring power Upanishads; as well as the co-soul and the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, it only had the Space power Upanishad, and the energy running in this body was also the strange space energy.

As soon as he had activated space energy, his body seemed to pierce through so many layers of spaces to plunge to the deepest area in this void, his speed being amazing.

Sinking! Sinking further with no return!

After an unknown time, perhaps a moment or a million years, his soul suddenly shook!

He had sensed the aura of the purest space energy!

In this moment, his feet felt a rigid ground. He stooped to see, his face switching to a thrilled countenance instantly. He couldn’t help but laugh contentedly. “Indeed!”

Under his feet was a spacious mirror that didn’t have an end. It filled every area of the void, separating the tier of power Upanishads and the Sea of Consciousness.

It was the Space Power Upanishad Origin in the shape of a colossal mirror!

The tier of power Upanishad was above the Sea of Consciousness, and that mirror separated them like the Absolute Beginning Gateway separated the world.

“Laborious searching isn’t as good as thinking a little more. Time won’t mistreat people with a resolute mind!” While laughing, Shi Yan released the pure space energy, slowly entering the bright mirror underneath and starting to fuse with the Space Power Upanishad Origin.
